description: Returns a list of Prime Contracts for a given project.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Specifies which view (which attributes) of the resource is going to be present in the response.  The extended view includes architect name, contractor name, vendor name and custom fields data, whil...

parameters.name: filters[accounting_method]
parameters.description: Filter to unit or amount based contracts

parameters.name: filters[architect_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Architect ID(s). These are Login Information IDs.

parameters.name: filters[contractor_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Contractor ID(s). These are Vendor IDs.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description: Filter based on the created_at time.

parameters.name: filters[deleted_at]
parameters.description: Filter based on the deleted_at time.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[signature_required]
parameters.description: Filter based on whether a signature is required.

parameters.name: filters[status]
parameters.description:
Filter to specific statuses.
For Work Order Contracts: Draft, Out For Bid, Out For Signature, Approved, Complete, Terminated, Void. 
For Purchase Order Contracts: Draft, Processing, Submitted, Part...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description: Filter based on the updated_at time.

parameters.name: filters[vendor_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Vendor ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[executed]
parameters.description: Filter based on whether a contract is executed.
